caption: A man with short, styled hair and a trimmed beard is recorded in a studio setting against a background of dark, ribbed acoustic foam panels. He is wearing large over-ear headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt. He sits behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. In the initial sequence, he looks slightly to his left with a neutral expression. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze forward and begins to gesture with both hands, lifting them from his sides and spreading his fingers to emphasize his speech. His mouth moves as he talks into the microphone, and his expression becomes more animated as he uses his hands to articulate his points. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
